payload.answer: I can’t store “everything about AI” as a memory. Please provide specific durable information you want remembered, such as your AI-related interests, preferences, projects, goals, or recurring needs.

entity_resolution.reason: The request is overly broad and does not provide a specific, durable, user-relevant fact to store.

details: No memory was created because the request was too broad and not specific enough to store reliably.

repair_options: Specify a personal preference, e.g. “Remember that I prefer practical AI explanations with examples.”
Specify an ongoing project, e.g. “Remember that I’m building an AI chatbot for customer support.”
Specify an interest area, e.g. “Remember that I’m interested in AI safety and evaluation methods.”
